columns.name: oppgjbrevNr
columns.description: The unique identifier for the oppgjorsbrev.

columns.name: journalnr
columns.description: A number identifying a journal entry.

columns.name: produsentnr
columns.description: The unique identifier for the producer of the oppgjorsbrev.

columns.name: linjenr
columns.description: The line number within the oppgjorsbrev.

columns.name: plasseringsKode
columns.description: The code indicating where the item is placed or positioned.

columns.name: trekktypeKode
columns.description: The type of withdrawal associated with this line in the oppgjorsbrev.

columns.name: referansenr
columns.description: A reference number for additional identification purposes.

columns.name: tekst
columns.description: The textual description or remarks associated with this line.

columns.name: belop
columns.description: The financial amount related to this line in the oppgjorsbrev.

columns.name: brukerId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the user associated with this transaction.

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when this line was last modified or created.

columns.name: trekkOppdragNr
columns.description: The number of the withdrawal order associated with this line.
